data.title: Vow ASA to Release Second Half 2024 Financial Report
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Vow ASA ( (SSHPF) ) just unveiled an update.

Vow ASA announced the release of its second half 2024 financial report, scheduled for February 27, 2025. The company will host a presentation and Q&A session for shareholders and interested parties, available both in-person in Oslo and via webcast. This event underscores Vow’s commitment to transparency and engagement with its stakeholders, reflecting its strategic focus on sustainable solutions and industry leadership in decarbonization.

More about Vow ASA

Vow ASA, along with its subsidiaries Scanship, C.H. Evensen, and Etia, specializes in converting biomass and waste into valuable resources and clean energy. The company is a leader in wastewater purification and waste valorization in the cruise market and holds strong positions in food safety, robotics, and heat-intensive industries with a focus on decarbonization. Vow ASA is headquartered in Oslo and is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

YTD Price Performance: -22.41%

Average Trading Volume: 4,160

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $39.63M

data.title: Peabody Energy to Present at BMO Metals Conference
data.description:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Peabody Energy Comm ( (BTU) ) has issued an update.

Peabody Energy Corporation announced its participation in the BMO Global Metals & Mining Conference starting February 24, 2025, where it plans to present its strategic focus and business developments. The company highlighted its transformation towards steelmaking coal to meet Asian demand, record safety and environmental performance in 2024, and strategic acquisitions, including Anglo American’s metallurgical coal portfolio, which are expected to enhance its market position and financial performance.

More about Peabody Energy Comm

Peabody Energy Corporation operates in the coal industry, focusing on the production and sale of thermal and metallurgical coal. The company serves markets in the United States and internationally, with a significant emphasis on meeting the growing demand for steelmaking coal in Asia.

data.title: Qurate Retail Group Rebrands to QVC Group, Inc.
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Qurate Retail Group ( (QRTEA) ) has issued an announcement.

On February 21, 2025, QVC Group, Inc. announced a name change from Qurate Retail, Inc. to QVC Group, Inc., effective immediately, with stock trading under new ticker symbols starting February 24, 2025. This rebranding aligns with the company’s strategy to expand in live social shopping, leveraging its brand equity and aiming to enhance its industry positioning. Additionally, the company advanced its annual meeting to May 12, 2025, to facilitate a proposed reverse stock split to maintain Nasdaq listing compliance.

More about Qurate Retail Group

QVC Group, Inc., formerly known as Qurate Retail, Inc., is a Fortune 500 company specializing in live social shopping. It operates six leading retail brands: QVC, HSN, Ballard Designs, Frontgate, Garnet Hill, and Grandin Road. The company reaches over 200 million homes worldwide through various platforms, including television channels, streaming apps, and social media, redefining the shopping experience with video-driven commerce.

Average Trading Volume: 1,888,592

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Trendlines Group Announces Board Restructuring
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Trendlines Group ( (SG:42T) ) has shared an announcement.

The Trendlines Group Ltd., an Israel-incorporated company, has announced significant changes to its Board of Directors and Board Committees. Ms. Nehama Ronen has been appointed as the permanent Chair of the Board, and Mr. Haim Brosh has been appointed as an Executive Director, both effective from February 24, 2025. Additionally, Ms. Elka Nir will retire from her roles as an External and Independent Director and relinquish her committee positions. These changes are expected to impact the company’s governance structure and strategic direction.

More about Trendlines Group

AEON Stores (Hong Kong) Co., Limited ( (HK:0984) ) has shared an announcement.

AEON Stores (Hong Kong) Co., Limited has announced an extraordinary general meeting to be held on March 13, 2025, where shareholders will consider and vote on resolutions related to the approval and ratification of the Master Services Agreement and the GC Master Agreement. These agreements are significant for the company’s operations as they outline key transactions and set annual caps for these transactions, indicating potential strategic moves to enhance operational efficiency and stakeholder value.

More about AEON Stores (Hong Kong) Co., Limited

AEON Stores (Hong Kong) Co., Limited operates in the retail industry, focusing on providing a wide range of consumer goods through its stores in Hong Kong. The company is part of the AEON Group, a leading retail group in Asia, and it aims to deliver quality products and services to its customers.

OceanaGold ( (TSE:OGC) ) has issued an update.

OceanaGold has announced a new discovery and high-grade drill results at the Haile Gold Mine in the United States, highlighting the potential of the Pisces and Horseshoe areas. The company has increased its 2025 exploration budget by 20% to $10 million, reflecting its commitment to enhancing shareholder value through exploration success.

OceanaGold Corporation is a multinational gold mining company with operations in the United States. The company’s primary focus is on gold exploration and production, with a significant presence at the Haile Gold Mine.

data.title: Argyle Resources Closes Second Tranche of Private Placement, Secures $995,400
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Argyle Resources Corp. ( (TSE:ARGL) ) has issued an announcement.

Argyle Resources Corp. announced the closing of the second tranche of its non-brokered private placement, raising approximately $995,400. The funds will be directed towards mineral exploration and working capital, enhancing the company’s operational capacity and potentially influencing its market positioning in the mineral exploration industry.

More about Argyle Resources Corp.

Argyle Resources Corp. is a junior mineral exploration company focused on acquiring, exploring, and evaluating natural resource properties in North America. The company holds interests in projects such as the Frenchvale Graphite Property in Nova Scotia and several quartzite silica projects in Quebec, Canada. Argyle collaborates with the INRS for exploration programs and was incorporated in 2023, with its head office located in Calgary, Alberta, Canada.

data.title: Dryden Gold Secures Permits for Expanded Exploration at Gold Rock Camp
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Dryden Gold Corp ( (TSE:DRY) ).

Dryden Gold Corp. has obtained exploration permits from the Ontario Ministry of Mines to continue drill testing at the Gold Rock Camp. This development allows the company to expand its 2025 drill program to 15,000 meters, focusing on the Elora Gold System and the Mud Lake target area. The permits are seen as a significant milestone for Dryden Gold, enabling it to test high-value targets and potentially unlock the district-scale potential of its land package. This could enhance the company’s positioning in the market and provide further opportunities for exploration success.

More about Dryden Gold Corp

Dryden Gold Corp. is an exploration company focused on discovering high-grade gold mineralization. It is listed on both the TSX Venture Exchange and the OTCQB marketplace. The company has a 100% interest in a strategic land package in the Dryden District of Northwestern Ontario, an area with historic gold mines but limited modern exploration. With a management team experienced in creating shareholder value, Dryden Gold’s property hosts high-grade gold mineralization along a 50km potential strike length.

YTD Price Performance: -17.24%

Average Trading Volume: 206,017

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

An update from Standard Development Group Limited ( (HK:1867) ) is now available.

Standard Development Group Limited has announced its application for two major green certifications, ISCC EU and VCS, for its biomass energy projects. Successfully obtaining these certifications is expected to boost the company’s market competitiveness, enhance its brand image, open up new markets, particularly in the European Union, and create new revenue streams through the sale of carbon credits.

More about Standard Development Group Limited

Standard Development Group Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operates in the green energy sector, focusing on biomass energy projects. The company aims to advance sustainable energy solutions and enhance its presence in both domestic and international markets.
